evidence: MusiteDeep is a deep-learning predictor for protein PTM site prediction; it operates entirely within this task definition (per-residue binary classification per PTM type using a sequence window)

MusiteDeep's timestamp-based benchmark on 13 PTM types shows higher AUC and area-under-PR than ModPred (logistic regression) and the strongest classical per-PTM baseline (DeepPhos, GlycoEP, GPS-PAIL, MePred-RF, CSS-Palm4.0, UbiProber, GPS-SUMO, RF-Hydroxysite) on 12 of 13 PTM types under both metrics
